intro: End-to-end cloud engineering for startup teams that need a clear delivery plan, reliable deployment support, and a partner who can actually ship the work.

services.title: Architecture review
services.description: A paid discovery and audit pass for VPC design, IAM, and multi-environment account structure. AWS and GCP are equal focus areas, with Azure-ready patterns when needed.

services.title: Launch pipeline
services.description: GitHub Actions workflows that lint, test, build, and deploy on every push. Designed as a fixed-scope launch engagement with health checks from day one.

services.title: Infrastructure as code
services.description: Terraform-first modules for repeatable, version-controlled infrastructure, with Pulumi support where it fits. Remote state, workspaces, and secrets management included in a scoped delivery.

services.title: Containers & orchestration
services.description: Dockerised services on ECS Fargate, lightweight Kubernetes, or Cloud Run for fast managed deployment. Matched to your scale, budget, and handoff needs.

services.title: Monitoring & alerting
services.description: Observability from day one - structured logs, metrics dashboards, uptime alerts, and on-call runbooks your team can actually follow.

services.title: Cost optimisation
services.description: Audit unused resources, right-size compute, implement spot/preemptible strategies, and plan committed-use or reserved capacity before cloud spend surprises you.

services.title: Security hardening
services.description: Least-privilege IAM, secrets management, WAF setup, dependency scanning, and SAST pipeline integration. A practical hardening sprint, not a slide deck.

services.title: Open-source stacks
services.description: Rust/Axum, Python/FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQLite, React, and Databricks-integrated data workflows - production setups with open tooling and pragmatic managed services.
